title: SU men's lax earns NCAA tournament home game against Ivy League foe
summary: Syracuse University men's lacrosse team earned an NCAA tournament home game against an Ivy League opponent, beginning their pursuit of a 12th national championship at home. This announcement highlights SU's athletic achievement and the economic/community benefits of hosting a tournament game in Syracuse.
processing_notes: Article is sports/athletics focused with minimal relevance to City of Syracuse Chief Innovation Officer priorities
